text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the Arima Kinen. Though Kitasan
Black was a nobody at first, she now shines as the
third most popular Umamusume by fan vote, thus
qualifying her for the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Standing at number one of the fan polls is Gold
Ship. It's time to face the Unsinkable Battleship!
